features.name: large_fanout_wire_with_long_alias_names
features.description: Code should include a single wire with fanout exceeding ~90000 bits combined with long alias names exceeding 2000 characters, which triggers integer overflow in Yosys autoname when wire score exceeds INT32_MAX/20000
features.snippet:
wire [89999:0] fanout_wire; // single wire fanning out to ~90000 destinations
// followed by many assign statements creating long names > 2000 chars
